arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy was the interim Manchester United boss before being replaced by Ruben Amorim, who brought a host of his own coaching staff from Sporting Lisbon

arts.ttl: Manchester United could start Ruben Amorim squad rebuild earlier than expected
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has been the poster boy of the Man Utd academy for years and it was once unthinkable he would be sold, but we have now entered that territory.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher admits Manchester United have a “problem” in the Marcus Rashford saga
arts.sum: Liverpool legend Jamie Carragher has said it was an easy decision for Ruben Amorim to drop Marcus Rashford from the Manchester United squad this weekend. With Rashford under-performing, Carragher feels it was not actually that big a call from Amorim to leave the 27-year-old out of his team, though he admits the club now have […] The post Jamie Carragher admits Manchester United have a “problem” in the Marcus Rashford saga appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: I was once linked with the Tottenham job – now I could knock them out of the Carabao Cup

arts.ttl: Manchester United predicted XI vs Tottenham Hotspur as Ruben Amorim makes Marcus Rashford decision

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou reveals further Destiny Udogie Tottenham update and Sergio Reguilon absence
arts.sum: “I always feel my role in that is, it’s not telling people what to do, but hopefully trying to guide the football club into a place where all these things can be resolved in a secondary way where the focus, particularly on match day, is just on us winning games of football. Postecoglou has revealed that fatigue is currently the issue for Udogie, who wanted to play on in the game against Southampton before Spurs decided not to risk him given their rotten luck on the injury front.

arts.ttl: Rashford a £60m problem as Man Utd get their De Jong at last
arts.sum: His position is detailed in The Athletic, which reports that even clubs in the Saudi Pro League do not want to take on the winger, despite the influence of a Man Utd legend in the case. Manchester United find themselves in the same position as Barcelona, who cannot sell Frenkie de Jong – a player that the Red Devils were, ironically, chasing hard as Erik ten Hag arrived at the club in the summer of 2022.
